mano_cua.result_summary: destroy()方法存在Bug：成功移除contenteditable/spellcheck/data-medium-editor-element/data-placeholder，但role=textbox、aria-multiline=true、medium-editor-index=0、data-medium-focused=true四个属性销毁后仍残留在DOM元素上
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The console now shows after editor.destroy(): ['class=editable', 'role=textbox', 'aria-multiline=true', 'medium-editor-index=0', 'data-medium-focused=true']. Original source HTML only has class="editable". This confirms destroy() method has a bug - it fails to remove role, aria-multiline, medium-editor-index, and data-medium-focused attributes.
